# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent { label 'master' } // Runs directly on the Jenkins master node

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                echo 'Starting build process...'
                // Example build commands (replace with your actual build steps)
                sh 'mvn clean install -DskipTests'
                echo 'Build complete.'
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                echo 'Running tests...'
                // Example test commands (replace with your actual test runners)
                sh 'mvn test'
                echo 'All tests passed.'
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                echo 'Deploying application to production environment...'
                // Example deployment commands (replace with your actual deployment scripts/tools)
                sh './deploy-production.sh'
                echo 'Deployment to production complete.'
            }
        }
    }
}
